skill_changes.reason: The skill is already injected for the task, so related-skill wording was changed to avoid asking the executor to install other skills.

The original README instructed users to copy SKILL.md into ~/.claude/skills. The benchmark injects the skill directly at /root/skills/duckdb-cli-ai-skills, so that visible install instruction was replaced with the injected runtime path.

Replaces the prior data-analyst-pro injection (one-sentence template SKILL.md) with a 16-script Excel automation skill (validate / aggregate / deduplicate / merge / format) that materially helps the QA-the-workbook task. Removed upstream pip-install instructions because the workspace pre-installs openpyxl / pandas via task-setup.
